name: King Slime
description:
[TERRARIA]

Finally found out who made the art, sad they nuked their account and art.

Edit: Added new scenario, and cyos.

It's the king of all that is slimy, it's King Slime! He was called into your village because you killed one too many slimes during the Slime Rain! Now He'll make you pay with war! Can you smooth talk your way out, or will you fight?

[ART BY JINXD101]
creator: MarkovRobot
